architecture.summary: Two-phase LLM flow: batch classify all auto prompts then evaluate all. Same LlmClient for both phases.

integrations.summary: N/A - uses existing LlmClient, no new external integrations

ui-ux.summary: Informational auto badge on results, updated help text for prefix conventions

performance.summary: N/A - batch classification minimizes overhead, same model instance

security.summary: N/A - local eval tool, no auth or PII changes

edge-cases.summary: Classification error defaults to should_activate. Missing frontmatter skips classification. Explicit prefixes bypass classification.
